{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322012058A6A10A8FF509DE2D0C41"}"},"total":47},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608189111092282137","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一口气看到最新章，这本书作者下了很重的心思，整体来说我挺喜欢，加油，这本书的书粉有我一个"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771422207,"group_id":"7598782336758451225","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1dLAH+7pb5poBGuZMAJjVY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f82a9ed16b5542a49126aa202b54361e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701172&x-signature=FHuYULcodtS6ZV9Q1HLZ1zxBNqY%3D","user_id":"325054645143651","user_name":"一介散人？"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"325054645143651","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1646492657,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7598782336758451225","book_info":{"abstract":"【动漫衍生】【柯南同人】【系统流】【双面人格】【爽文】【多女主】【强者归来】【杀伐果断】【全拆】
一场意外邂逅，上官白羽意外觉醒罪恶收集系统，尘封前世记忆尽数复苏。
人前，他是眉眼倾城、风度卓绝的顶级贵公子，温润有礼，万千青睐；
人后，他是冷漠果决、执掌黑暗的暗夜主宰，行事狠厉，从无桎梏。
系统在手，惩戒罪恶即可解锁无上奖励。
宗师战力、隐秘代号权位、顶尖推理头脑、滔天财富……悉数到手。
妃英理、毛利兰、贝尔摩德、宫野明美、灰原哀、铃木园子，一众绝色佳人，皆是他宿命羁绊。
不伪善、不妥协、不被世俗正义绑架，更不被原有剧情束缚。
从此在柯南世界横推一切，以罪恶铺就登顶之路，凭实力坐拥群芳，铸就黑暗传奇！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3abac0d2828c2584d0ae5c6755d75a38","author":"奶糖太甜了","author_id":"","book_id":"7598782336758451225","book_name":"柯南：执掌黑暗，绝色群芳我独占","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7598809862666977817","read_count":"30213","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"366795"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"182","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,系统,二次元,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/18bed3e2faee8309bf21ad5cb1db3b53~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779297658&x-signature=R%2Bn4VPrStkl4%2FKynJerMUyeU4GE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109168783133","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"79"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322012058A6A10A8FF509DE2D0C41"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forw
